items.title: Why Open Source AI Could Be the Best Bet for Developers and Investors
items.description: Tech giants are pouring trillions of dollars into AI chips and data centers while the industry quietly faces a fork in the road between open source and proprietary models. AMD chair and CEO Lisa Su and former IBM CEO Sam Palmisano explain why that choice could shape the next era of computing.

items.title: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna Breaks Down Why A 100-Gigawatt AGI Push Could Cost $8T, Says That's 'Today's Number'
items.description: Artificial intelligence companies are pouring extraordinary sums into massive data centers. One estimate now puts a 100-gigawatt artificial general intelligence effort at about $8 trillion. International Business Machines Corp. (NYSE:IBM) CEO Arvind Krishna recently told the "Decoder" podcast. He said filling a 1-gigawatt data center costs about $80 billion and called it "today's number." Krishna said a company committing 20–30 gigawatts could face about $1.5 trillion in spending using current c

items.title: With Talk of a SpaceX IPO, Tesla Shareholders Dream of an X Corp.
items.description: Tesla shareholders have already approved an investment by the electric-vehicle maker in Elon Musk’s xAI. Could SpaceX be next?

items.title: Software Testing Market to Hit USD 126.91 Billion by 2033, Driven by Rising Demand for High-Quality and Secure Digital Applications | SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global Software Testing Market is projected to grow from USD 54.11 billion in 2025 to USD 126.91 billion by 2033, driven by digital transformation, cloud adoption, and increasing demand for secure, high-quality software applications.

items.title: Law Enforcement Software Market Set for Steady Growth to USD 40.82 Billion by 2033, Driven by Rising Digital Policing and Public Safety Needs | SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The law enforcement software market is projected to grow from USD 18.86 billion in 2025 to USD 40.82 billion by 2033, driven by digital policing technologies, AI-enabled analytics, and cloud-based tools for crime prevention and public safety.
